codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit only updates a /login docstring and does not provide evidence that the feature's required authenticated cross-flow verifications were executed. The handoff explicitly states those browser walkthroughs were not exercised, so required expected behavior remains unverified for this feature.

issues.description: Feature requires end-to-end authenticated flows and role/session checks (features.json expectedBehavior and verificationSteps), but handoff says these authenticated browser walkthroughs were not exercised due to missing stable credentials; therefore core acceptance criteria for cleanup-cross-flow-verification were not completed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission/shared docs define a test-account strategy but do not provide concrete stable credentials or a deterministic seeded-session path for authenticated cross-flow verification in this milestone, causing required checks to be deferred.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/user-testing.md describes creating users via setup, while handoff records authenticated checks as undone (handoff line 12) and interactiveChecks empty (line 121).

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker procedure requires agent-browser for UI-flow verification but does not clearly define how to handle verification-only features when authenticated credentials are unavailable; worker reported followedProcedure=true while skipping required browser flow assertions from the feature contract.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md line 23 requires agent-browser; feature verificationSteps in features.json include multiple agent-browser flows; handoff shows no interactive checks.

summary: FAIL: commit f422eca only removes legacy login-path text in a comment. Required authenticated cross-flow verification outcomes for cleanup-cross-flow-verification were explicitly left undone, so feature acceptance criteria are not fully met.
